zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cunningham於1609年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾時，他的父親William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland24歲，母親Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton21歲。他於1629年與Anne Bennett在愛爾蘭武爾斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1705年在他的家鄉享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cunningham于1609年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾多聶加爾时，他的父亲William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland24岁，母亲Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton21岁。他于1629年与Anne Bennett在爱尔兰武爾斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1705年在他的家乡享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: John

historicEvents.description: Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.

The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.
Over 6,000 Irish boys and women sold as slaves since England gained control of Jamaica.
William of Orange (William III) lands at Carrickfergus and defeats James II at Battle of the Boyne.
Exclusion of Catholics from Parliament and all professions.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cunningham was born in 1609, in Donegal, County Donegal, Ireland, his father, William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland, was 24 and his mother, Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton, was 21. He married Anne Bennett in 1629, in Ulster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1705, in his hometown, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cunningham est né en 1609, à Donegal, County Donegal, Irlande, son père, William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anne Bennett en 1629, à Ulster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1705, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 96 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cunninghamが1609年にアイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルドンエガルで生まれた時，父William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotlandは24歳，母Isobel "Grizel" Hamiltonは21歳であった。1629年にアイルランドウルスターでAnne Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1705年に故郷で96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cunningham(이)가 1609년 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 도네걸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1629년 아일랜드 울스터에서 Anne Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1705년 그의 고향에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cunningham родился в 1609 г. в местности доунегаль, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия, его отцу по имени William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Bennett в 1629 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1705 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 96 лет.
